What is the difference between a Pokémon's HP and PP?
400.a: HP is health points — when 0, Pokémon faints. PP is the number of times a move can be used

400.q: What are the Elite Four?
400.a: Four powerful trainers who must be defeated before challenging the Pokémon League Champion

400.q: Who is Lance?
400.a: The Dragon-type trainer — Pokémon League Champion in Gold/Silver

400.q: What is a shiny Pokémon?
400.a: An extremely rare colour variant with different palette — odds are 1 in 4096

400.q: What is the significance of the GTS?
400.a: Global Trade System — allowing players to trade Pokémon with anyone worldwide

400.q: What is Mega Evolution?
400.a: A temporary transformation available in X and Y — powerfully enhancing a Pokémon's stats mid-battle

400.q: What is the mythical Pokémon Mew?
400.a: A rare Pokémon said to contain the DNA of every Pokémon — source of Mewtwo's creation

400.q: What is a held item?
400.a: An object a Pokémon carries into battle — it can boost stats, restore HP, or affect moves

400.q: What is STAB in Pokémon?
400.a: Same Type Attack Bonus — a 50% damage boost when a Pokémon uses a move matching its own type

400.q: What is the significance of Eevee?
400.a: It can evolve into eight different Pokémon (Eevolutions) depending on conditions or stones used

What is EV training?
600.a: Effort Value training — defeating specific Pokémon to maximise stats through hidden values

600.q: What is the Pokémon lore behind the creation of the universe?
600.a: Arceus created the universe; Dialga (time), Palkia (space), and Giratina (antimatter) were born from it

600.q: What is the significance of Red in the games?
600.a: The original protagonist — he appears as the final boss in Gold/Silver, representing the hardest challenge

600.q: What is the Nuzlocke Challenge?
600.a: A self-imposed ruleset: only catch the first Pokémon per route, and fainted Pokémon are permanently dead

600.q: What is the difference between Legendary and Mythical Pokémon?
600.a: Legendaries can be caught in the game; Mythicals are distributed through events only

600.q: What is the Hidden Ability system?
600.a: Each Pokémon species has a rare ability not normally obtainable — only through special events or Ability Patches

600.q: What is the deepest lore of Pokémon's origins?
600.a: The anime and games hint at a world that was reshaped by Arceus and nearly destroyed by Groudon, Kyogre, and Rayquaza's conflict

600.q: What is IVs in competitive Pokémon?
600.a: Individual Values — hidden stats from 0-31 in each stat category, determining a Pokémon's maximum potential

600.q: What is Pokémon GO's significance?
600.a: Released 2016 — it became a global phenomenon with augmented reality catching, breaking download records

600.q: What is the Ultra Beast concept?
600.a: Extradimensional Pokémon from Ultra Space introduced in Sun/Moon — they behave like invasive organisms
